'''yazuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oonucleus|oonucleus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oonucleus|oonucleus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yazuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæziyith|yæziyith]] || [[word:yæziyij|yæziyij]] || [[word:yæziyish|yæziyish]] || [[word:yæziyi|yæziyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazuzuyuth|yazuzuyuth]] || [[word:yazuzuyuj|yazuzuyuj]] || [[word:yazuzuyush|yazuzuyush]] || [[word:yazuzuyu|yazuzuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazuyuth|yazuyuth]] || [[word:yazuyuj|yazuyuj]] || [[word:yazuyush|yazuyush]] || [[word:yazuyu|yazuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazufyuth|yazufyuth]] || [[word:yazufyuj|yazufyuj]] || [[word:yazufyush|yazufyush]] || [[word:yazufyuf|yazufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazuyuthu|yazuyuthu]] || [[word:yazuyuju|yazuyuju]] || [[word:yazuyushu|yazuyushu]] || [[word:yazuyuku|yazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazuyuth|yazuyuth]] || [[word:yazuyuj|yazuyuj]] || [[word:yazuyush|yazuyush]] || [[word:yazuyu|yazuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazuyuthul|yazuyuthul]] || [[word:yazuyujul|yazuyujul]] || [[word:yazuyushul|yazuyushul]] || [[word:yazuyukul|yazuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazuyuthuthu|yazuyuthuthu]] || [[word:yazuyujuju|yazuyujuju]] || [[word:yazuyushushu|yazuyushushu]] || [[word:yazuyuku|yazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazuyuthun|yazuyuthun]] || [[word:yazuyujun|yazuyujun]] || [[word:yazuyushun|yazuyushun]] || [[word:yazuyukun|yazuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazuyuthuoro|yazuyuthuoro]] || [[word:yazuyujuoro|yazuyujuoro]] || [[word:yazuyushuoro|yazuyushuoro]] || [[word:yazuyukuoro|yazuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
